subject: Did You See This?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,

Did you see Eric's email? Chris Koster is taking a page out of the Clinton playbook - he launched another desperate attack against Eric today.

Can you help us fight back by chipping in [$25, $50, or even $100?](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=909b5091f1&e=84041254e6)

New job numbers came out today showing that Missouri had the largest unemployment rate increase in the nation. That's why Missouri needs new leadership and it's why Chris Koster is lying about Eric in a new attack ad.

We need to take back this state from career politicians. Can I tell Eric that you've got his back? [Chip in $25, $50 or $100](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=a5921ef97f&e=84041254e6) today and send the message that Missouri needs new leadership.

On to victory,
AC

Austin Chambers
Campaign Manager

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Eric Greitens** <eg@ericgreitens.com>
Date: Tue, Sep 20, 2016 at 12:39 PM
Subject: You've Got to See This News

Momentum is on our side, but I need your help. Today I was endorsed by the Missouri Corrections Officers Association. That follows our endorsement by the statewide Chamber of Commerce.

We need your help to keep the momentum going. If we can get our message to the people of Missouri, I know that they will recognize that our state is ready for positive change from outside of the political class.
[**_Chip In to Help Me Spread Our Message _**](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=9345d4f384&e=84041254e6)
Our momentum is real. Yesterday, [national experts ranked Missouri](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=08a4c5f83b&e=84041254e6) as the most likely governors race to switch parties. We are the best hope for our Party this year.
Now the attacks are coming. My opponent, career-politician Chris Koster launched a new attack ad today. He is taking a page of out of the Clinton playbook and lying about my record fighting for veterans because he's scared. He knows Missourians are ready for new leadership. I need your help to fight back.
[_**Fight Back --Join Our Mission Today**_](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=674a4a4b7f&e=84041254e6)
Best,
Eric Greitens
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108
Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

You can always reach us at [team@ericgreitens.com](mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? body:
Enter for your chance at a flight aboard the Trump campaign plane! ||
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37674340:Wn-tWhbNR:m:1:876315805:26EA169BE98B8388ACF9773389FBCC85:r)

Peter,

This is terrific -- you have a chance to travel with me on the Trump campaign plane. But you only have a limited time to enter.

[**Contribute $3 to be automatically entered to win a trip with me on the Trump campaign plane. **](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37674340:Wn-tWhbNR:m:1:876315805:26EA169BE98B8388ACF9773389FBCC85:r)

You and another guest will get your own seats aboard the Trump campaign plane as we head to another rally.

While Hillary Clinton spends all her time with liberal elites at closed-door fundraisers, I am out and about with the hard-working and patriotic Americans who are the backbone of our country.

**That includes you, and I 'd love to have you with us aboard the Trump campaign plane as we crisscross America firing up crowds and spreading our pro-borders, pro-jobs, pro-security message during the final home stretch of this campaign.**

[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37674340:Wn-tWhbNR:m:1:876315805:26EA169BE98B8388ACF9773389FBCC85:r)
Unlike Hillary, I am proud of Americans like you. I want you to be back in charge of your government.

body: Peter, I'll get right to it. We're at a disadvantage going into the final stretch of the election. Over the past three months, Nancy Pelosi crushed us in fundraising. In that time, they've outraised us by $16.6 million -- and that doesn't include the money President Obama raised for House Democrats this month. Peter -- I want to hold Hillary Clinton accountable for her actions -- but I can't do that if Nancy Pelosi becomes Speaker. And with these numbers and this momentum, she may win back the House. This may be our LAST chance to break their momentum. Next week marks the final FEC quarterly deadline before the election. I really need 1,535 grassroots conservatives to step up and help us close the gap. Will you pitch in? body: Peter, I'll get right to it. We're at a disadvantage going into the final stretch of the election. Over the past three months, Nancy Pelosi crushed us in fundraising. In that time, they've outraised us by $16.6 million -- and that doesn't include the money President Obama raised for House Democrats this month. Peter -- I want to hold Hillary Clinton accountable for her actions -- but I can't do that if Nancy Pelosi becomes Speaker. And with these numbers and this momentum, she may win back the House. This may be our LAST chance to break their momentum. Next week marks the final FEC quarterly deadline before the election. I really need 1,535 grassroots conservatives to step up and help us close the gap. Will you pitch in? name: Jessalyn Reid, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Don't miss your chance to help Team Hillary online!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
| | Derek --

You still have time to RSVP to join us for our social media training call.

We’ll be going over some really great things you can do online to support this team ahead of Election Day -- you won’t want to miss it!

**RSVP now to reserve your spot:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY1NjUxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgzMjM5NTg3S0&mt=2&rj=ODgzMjM5NTg3S0&rt=0)
Thanks,

Jess

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Jess Reid, HillaryClinton.com
Subject: Want to join me for a social media training? Derek --

One of my responsibilities as the digital director for Virginia is being in charge of our Facebook and Twitter accounts. That means coming up with the hashtags, finding the photos to share, and most importantly, making sure we energize our followers to turn out and vote for Hillary.

I know I can count on this team here in Virginia -- and if you have your own Facebook or Twitter account, we would love your help in promoting Hillary online! So this Wednesday, we’re holding a call with our most committed supporters to talk about the best ways to use social media. We’ll teach you all the best practices that can help ensure we reach as many voters online as possible here in Virginia.

**[Will you RSVP to join our call?](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjY1NjUxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgzMjM5NTg3S0&mt=2&rj=ODgzMjM5NTg3S0&rt=0)**

Now that we’re just 51 days away from Election Day, we’re not wasting any opportunities to get in touch with potential voters. We use our pages to share the hard work this team puts in, share the ideals we’re fighting for, and even spread the word so everyone knows when Hillary is coming to town!

**We’d love for you to get involved online, Derek. RSVP now for our social media training on Wednesday:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY1NjUxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgzMjM5NTg3S0&mt=2&rj=ODgzMjM5NTg3S0&rt=0)
I can’t wait to speak with you,

Jess

Jessalyn Reid
Virginia Digital Director
Hillary for America

| | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY1NjUxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgzMjM5NTg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjY1NjUxNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgzMjM5NTg3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. Senator Ron Johnson has been a fierce advocate during his time in Washington -- just not for the Wisconsinites he was elected to represent. He's been fighting hard for the Koch brothers, the NRA, and other right-wing special interest groups. He's fighting to make sure billionaires and multimillionaires like him have every advantage, while middle-class and working families are left behind.
This is one of the most critical Senate races in the nation. Whether we win or lose won't just affect Wisconsin: It will affect the future of the Senate, and even the future of the Supreme Court -- where decisions will change America for generations.
Senator Johnson's ten right-wing groups, three super PACs, and the NRA aren't going to give up their Senate seat without a fight. Today, we're asking you to step up and help us fight back.
We knew this race would get close -- but we also knew we could count on our grassroots team to see us through to the finish.

name: Pat Murray (via VanHollen.org)
subject: it's a disgrace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
Friend,

Congressional Republicans are still playing political games - and they're putting lives at risk.

They'd rather score political points with their Tea Party supporters than deal with critical issues that impact the lives of the American people.

When it comes to pharmaceutical companies jacking up the price of lifesaving devices like the EpiPen, passing increased funding to combat the Zika virus, or permitting a vote on common sense gun measures, Congressional Republicans are missing in action.

Americans have had enough of this gamesmanship. They deserve better.

[**Add your name and demand that Congressional Republicans stop playing games and start doing their jobs.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ac7/70cdc2ba/471ef63a/3975faa/125814056/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-republicans-do-their-jobs-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+and+demand+that+Congressio&utm_campaign=em092116&source=em092116")

While Chris is focusing on helping hard-working families get ahead, his opponent has been trying to blame Democrats for the fact that Congress doesn't work. Really!! But, we know the truth.

The truth is that Congressional Republicans are more interested in defunding Planned Parenthood or eliminating health care than protecting public safety, public health and American consumers.

The inaction of Republicans is disgraceful. They're putting partisan games before the health and welfare of American families. We need to send a strong message to the GOP that it's time to work for the American people, not protect big monied and powerful special interests.

[**Please sign on right now to demand that Congressional Republicans step up and DO THEIR JOBS.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ac7/70cdc2ba/471ef63a/3975fab/125814056/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/demand-republicans-do-their-jobs-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+sign+on+right+now+to+demand+that+&utm_campaign=em092116&source=em092116")

Thank you for your commitment to making government work for people and thanks for supporting Chris.

Pat Murray
Campaign Manager
Van Hollen For U.S. Senate

A month from today, ballots start dropping across the state.
Voters will begin making their choices up and down the ballot. The outcome of the governor's race will be determined in this 18-day voting period leading up to Election Day.
That's why it's crucial to start our Get Out the Vote efforts immediately. We cannot afford to let up with our winning ground game.
[**Can you rush a donation to help us raise $11,000 in the next 36 hours for our Get Out the Vote effort?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTU1OTIwMgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMTc2OTk5MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks to Washington's nation-leading vote-by-mail system, Get Out the Vote is a multi-week effort. We need your help to start organizing and mobilizing that effort now!
Your immediate support for our Get Out the Vote plan helps ensure that we mobilize support for Governor Inslee and Democratic candidates up and down the ticket, along with important initiatives on the ballot.
Thanks for helping us carry out this essential Get Out the Vote effort in every part of the state.
Aisling Kerins
Campaign Director
